title: Medical device shortage: 5ml CAT Serum Sep Clot Activator - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical device shortage: 5ml CAT Serum Sep Clot Activator
The 5ml CAT Serum Sep Clot Activator is currently reported as a medical device shortage through Interim Order No. 2 Respecting Drugs, Medical Devices and Foods for a Special Dietary Purpose in Relation to COVID-19 . Interim Order No. 2 repeals and replaces the Interim Order Respecting Drugs, Medical Devices and Foods for a Special Dietary Purpose in relation to COVID-19 (the previous interim order) made by the Minister on March 30, 2020. For a full list of shortages, refer to the list of medical device shortages .
Posted on 2022-03-11 Footnote 1
Actual medical device shortage
5ml CAT Serum Sep Clot Activator
Case of 24 packs, pack of 50 tubes, case of 1200 tubes
Greiner Bio-One North America, Inc.
4238 Capital Drive Monroe, North Carolina U.S.A 28110
Increase in demand for the medical device
This date reflects when a shortage report is first posted online. This page includes specific information related to the device that is in shortage. Updates to the status and end date of a shortage can be found on the List of shortages webpage.
